name: WORLDPURGE ⌬ The KLH-Verse.
description:
THE WORLDPURGE UPDATE.

Lorebooks will be added shortly janitor keeps erasing my FUCKING PROGRESS.

"Not your average RPG."

—A dumbass, "me"

Vro

For some reason every time I close out of this tab, Janitor decides to refresh EVERYTHING

So if something's missing, my bad. I wanted to fix a few things that I left off with (pre-studying) but I can NOT rewrite allat again 😭

We hit 100k though what y'all want 🤑
